channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Games
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Speak to the Manager
item.content:encoded:
We’re offering you a new role in ‘Strategic Fun Management’ with an epic bundle of fantastic goal-based strategy games and more! Make your queen proud in Empires of the Undergrowth, the unforgettable strategy RTS where you expand your earthly empire as a colony of ants; establish an interstellar home for human-envious robots in The Colonists; or choose a cleaner experience with Good Company, a robot-based management sim where the goal is to become the most optimized company in the world. Take control of any situation and have a blast doing so with the all-new Speak to the Manager Bundle before it’s gone.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 8th, 2027

item.title: Train Sim World 6: First Class Ticket Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Calling all conductors: Power up those engines and honk those whistles, because you won’t want to miss this fantastic Train Sim World 6 bundle! This collection of game coupons and DLC is your first class ticket to ride a great selection of all-new train lines and expand the Train Sim World map!

Get half-off coupons for standard, deluxe, and special editions of the main Train Sim World 6 game, plus a wealth of extras, like Diesel Legends of the Great Western, Los Angeles’ San Bernardino line, and the extra festive Holiday Train Pack! Grab all this and more for the price of your choice, and support the suicide prevention organization Campaign Against Living Miserably with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before August 6th, 2026

item.title: Sharp Shooters Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Ready your aim, the Sharp Shooters Bundle is in range! Unholster Strike Force Heroes, the multiplayer-centric classic arena shooter rebuilt with modern mechanics, Outriders, the bloody and brutal shooter that mixes quick gunplay, destructive powers, and deep RPG systems to create a dynamic hybrid experience, or set your sights on Way of the Hunter, the critically acclaimed hunting sim with unmatched realism and wildlife diversity! Try these games and more with the Sharp Shooters Bundle, and help support Charity: Water when you shop with Humble Bundle.

Keys Expire. Please redeem all before May 6th, 2027

item.title: Humble 15 for $15 - April 2026
item.content:encoded:
Looking for great games at low prices? Unlock 15 amazing titles for only $15 today. Grab your best friend and dive into Chip ‘N Clawz vs. The Brainioids, a colorful local multiplayer extravaganza where you’ll face off against freaky Brains-in-Jars aliens. Pinball meets action and mystery in Pinball Spire, a fast-paced pinballvania experiment that slaps! Or step into the boots of the ‘big bad boss’ and rethink what it means to be the enemy in The Dark Queen of Mortholme. Plus, your purchase helps support the Starlight Children’s Foundation.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 6th, 2027

item.title: Tower Defense 2
item.content:encoded:
Impenetrable defenses and unbeatable prices—pay what you want for eight outstanding tower defense games like Thronefall, with its gorgeously simple visuals alongside addicting city-building and tower defense gameplay to deliver countless hours of intense battles. Affogato, the deliciously inventive RPG and tower defense hybrid that drops players into the shoes of a sorceress managing a cafe. And Orcs Must Die! 3 Complete Bundle, where you’ll burn, bruise, slice, and zap hordes of orcs! Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support Active Minds!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 1st, 2027

item.title: 15th anniversary Golden Tales
item.description: High concept adventure games for high concept players
item.content:encoded:
There’s so much more to video games than filling up Pokéballs and nerfing your pals in COD lobbies. You know this, we know this, and to prove that the scope of video game storytelling is truly infinite, we’re bringing you a bundle of fan favorites that stretch the imagination to its limits. Search for your missing crewmates while exploring an alien planet in hard sci-fi Stanislaw Lem adaptation The Invincible! Make choices that determine the fates of two families drawn together by desperation in As Dusk Falls! Explore and document a brand new world with your trusty bicycle in Season: A Letter to the Future! There’s so much more to explore in this bundle of great adventure games, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 1st, 2027

item.title: Sovereign Sandbox Bundle
item.description: Thy kingdom come will be done
item.content:encoded:
Construct an empire your way with the all-new Sovereign Sandbox Bundle! Lead the Lovecraftian believers to salvation through unique city-building mechanics in Worshippers of Cthulhu, take on the role of Park Manager and develop a prehistoric animal park (that doesn’t threaten humanity) in Prehistoric Kingdom, and create without limits as you harness the all-mighty power of the creator in The Universim. Pay what you want for great games and help support War Child with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 29th, 2027

item.title: Destiny 2: Expansions Bundle 2026
item.content:encoded: Get ready to hop around the solar system, defending humanity and its allies from Darkness with this bundle made for anyone who wants the full Destiny 2 experience! This bundle includes the latest DLC collection, the Year of Prophecy Ultimate Edition, where you'll head out to the mysterious planetoid of Kepler in The Edge of Fate, uncovering a dire prophecy of extinction, and ally with the leaders of the criminal underworld to save the galaxy in Renegades. Not to mention chase down the Witness to prevent the apocalypse in The Final Shape and defeat Light-bearing Hive in The Witch Queen. You'll also get content like the 30th Anniversary Pack—packed with fan‑favorite activities and rewards. You can get all this and more in this bundle—plus a 25% off coupon for Bungie's newest game Marathon! Every purchase at the price of your choice supports the Bungie Foundation.

item.title: Best of Humble Bundle: Avatar Legends 20th Anniversary Physical RPG Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Experience a cultural phenomenon in an all-new way from the comfort of your home with the Avatar Legends: 20th Anniversary Physical RPG Bundle by Magpie Games. Choose an elemental bending specialty, create an original character, gather your friends, and embark on adventures alongside beloved heroes like Katara, Toph, and Zuko. Get Avatar Legends: The Roleplaying Game shipped to you with an official dice set, GM screen, journal pack, cloth map, and Pai Sho tiles. Act fast—this Humble exclusive won’t last long! Pay what you want and help support the ACLU with your purchase.

Limited Quantities Available!

Key expires. Please redeem before May 31st, 2026

item.title: 2K Tactics & Tycoons
item.description: Master the art of war…or just the art of city planning
item.content:encoded:
Master tacticians and tycoons, assemble! You’ll want to take advantage of this great bundle of war games and city strategy simulators fit for the business tycoon and/or valorous general inside you. Get your boots on the ground and send your battalions to the front lines with four games from the Army Men series! Manage the railways of past and present in Railroad Tycoon II Platinum and Railroad Tycoon 3! Take things way back in time with CivCity: Rome, or way into the future with the Homeworld Remastered Collection! There’s way more to explore in this bundle, so make the savvy business move of getting it while it’s hot, and support Covenant House with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 24th, 2027

item.title: Best of Humble: Fight 4 Your Friends
item.content:encoded:
There’s no horde you can’t stop together in this epic refresh of action-packed titles featuring some of the best co-op shooters out there! We’ve assembled a curated collection of our favorite zombie games with all-new content for you to enjoy. Face the once-human hosts of the Ridden in the acclaimed 4-player Back 4 Blood. Stand against the Skaven and Chaos swarms in Warhammer: Vermintide 2. Save humankind from undead Armageddon in Zombie Army 4: Dead War. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support Trees, Water, People!

Keys expire. Please redeem Back 4 Blood: Deluxe Edition and Warhammer: Vermintide 2: Collector's Edition before October 22nd, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before April 22nd, 2027.

item.title: Strategic Minds Collection
item.description: Plan your moves, pitch your battles, defeat your enemies
item.content:encoded:
Got an unquenchable desire to lead armies into battle against dark forces but nowhere to let loose? We’ve got just the bundle for you: A collection of strategy games of all genres and levels of difficulty, fit for seasoned generals and new recruits alike. Lead the forces of mankind against the machines in Terminator: Dark Fate - Defiance! Travel across the stars and explore new worlds with your brand-new faster-than-light fleet in Galactic Civilizations IV! There are even more games in this bundle to flex your strategy skills, so refresh your battle tactics and grab this bundle at the price of your choice—every purchase supports BuildOn!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 22nd, 2027

item.title: Sekai Project 2026
item.description: Play the hottest titles in adult gaming
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Find love, companionship, and a little something extra with a curated collection of hot and spicy sim games. This tantalizing bundle is guaranteed to excite even the shyest of gamers: A misunderstanding transforms into a compelling love story in My Girlfriend's Special Place. Fall for the hottest patisserie shop employees in Nekopara Vol. 3, or follow along as your favorite catgirls journey to France to master new baking techniques and find love in Nekopara Vol. 4. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support charity!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 17th, 2027
